title: Volker Böhm
text: Home * People * Volker Böhm Volker Böhm [1] Volker Böhm , a German computer scientist and chess programmer. Along with his fellow Ralf Schäfer , Volker Böhm is author of the chess engine Spike [2] , which incorporates ideas from Volker's former engine IceSpell and Schäfer's former program Cheetah , and won the first Livingston Chess960 Computer World Championship 2005 in Mainz [3] [4] .
